# MODULE ARCHITECTURE REPORT

**Module:** vport-public-menu  
**Application Scope:** VCSM  
**Module Type:** public-facing feature module  
**Primary Root:** `apps/VCSM/src/features/public/vportMenu/`  
**Independence Status:** MOSTLY INDEPENDENT  
**Completeness Status:** MOSTLY COMPLETE  
**Scan Date:** 2026-05-27  
**Generated By:** ARCHITECT

---

## PURPOSE

The Restaurant/Business VPORT Card Preview & Online Menu module is the **public-facing surface** for any VPORT actor. It renders:

1. **Online Menu** — category + item grid with search, pricing, images, read from `vport.public_menu_read_model_v`
2. **Business Card Header** — avatar, banner, display name, rating summary, Directions + Call CTAs
3. **Reviews Tab** — paginated review cards, star summary, per-dimension breakdown bars
4. **QR Code Views** — full-screen QR for menu URL and reviews URL, never exposing raw UUID
5. **Slug Resolution** — routes from human-readable slugs (`/profile/:slug/menu`) or legacy actorId paths (`/actor/:actorId/menu`)

External business sites (e.g. Tripoint Lock & Keys) can link to `/profile/:slug/menu` and see a fully rendered business card preview with live menu data from VCSM.

---

## OWNERSHIP

**Module Owner:** `features/public/vportMenu/`  
**Adapter surface:** `features/public/vportMenu/adapters/vportMenu.adapter.js`  
**Route owner:** `app/routes/public/vportMenu.routes.jsx`  
**Lazy loader:** `app/routes/lazyPublic.jsx`  

**Cross-feature dependencies (incoming consumers):**
- `features/dashboard/flyerBuilder/` — consumes VportPublicMenuView embedded in flyer builder
- `features/profiles/kinds/vport/screens/menu/VportActorMenuPublicView.jsx` — **DUPLICATE IMPLEMENTATION** (see boundary warnings)

---

## ENTRY POINTS

| Route | Screen | Access Type |
|---|---|---|
| `/m/:actorId` | `VportPublicMenuRedirectScreen` | Legacy short-link → redirects to slug URL |
| `/profile/:slug/menu` | `VportPublicMenuBySlugScreen` | Canonical slug-based public menu |
| `/profile/:slug/menu/qr` | `VportPublicMenuQrBySlugScreen` | Menu QR code view |
| `/profile/:slug/reviews` | `VportPublicReviewsBySlugScreen` | Canonical slug-based public reviews |
| `/profile/:slug/reviews/qr` | `VportPublicReviewsQrBySlugScreen` | Reviews QR code view |
| `/actor/:actorId/menu` | `VportActorMenuPublicScreen` (profiles feature) | Legacy actorId → redirects to slug |
| `/actor/:actorId/menu/qr` | `VportPublicMenuQrScreen` (within this module) | Legacy QR → redirects to slug |
| `/actor/:actorId/menu/flyer` | `VportActorMenuFlyerScreen` (dashboard feature) | Release-flagged flyer screen |

**⚠️ NOTE:** `/actor/:actorId/menu` is served by `VportActorMenuPublicScreen` from `features/profiles/kinds/vport/` — NOT from `features/public/vportMenu/`. This is a **routing split** — two features co-own the same domain.

---

## LAYER MAP

### DAL Layer — `features/public/vportMenu/dal/`

| File | Tables/Views | Cache | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `readVportPublicDetails.rpc.dal.js` | `vport.public_menu_read_model_v`, `vport.public_actor_seo_v` | NONE | Two-step: primary view → fallback SEO view |
| `readVportPublicMenu.rpc.dal.js` | `vport.public_menu_read_model_v` | NONE | Reads full category+item rows for the view |
| `resolveMenuSlug.dal.js` | `vport.public_menu_read_model_v` | 10min TTL | Only resolves vports with active menu items |
| `resolveVportSlug.dal.js` | `vport.public_actor_seo_v` | 10min TTL | Resolves any vport with a public profile |
| `readPublicVportReviews.dal.js` | `reviews.public_vport_reviews_v` | NONE | Cursor-based pagination, PAGE_SIZE=20 |
| `readPublicVportReviewSummary.dal.js` | `reviews.public_vport_review_summary_v` | 60s TTL | Aggregated summary row |
| `readPublicVportReviewDimensions.dal.js` | `reviews.public_vport_review_dimensions_v` | 60s TTL | Per-dimension breakdown rows |

**Total DAL methods:** 7  
**Total DB views touched:** 5 across 2 schemas (`vport`, `reviews`)

---

### Model Layer — `features/public/vportMenu/model/`

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `vportPublicDetails.model.js` | Maps raw DB row → safe domain details object. Handles legacy field aliases, URL validation, social_links parsing, directions URL building, avatar vs logo deduplication (VENOM V-001 compliant) |
| `vportPublicMenu.model.js` | Maps view rows → categories/items tree. Supports both `public_menu_read_model_v` row format and legacy RPC envelope. Handles orphaned items |
| `vportPublicMenuPanel.model.js` | Panel presentation helpers: `PANEL_STYLE`, `THUMB_WRAP_STYLE`, `formatMenuItemPrice()`, `filterMenuCategories()` |
| `vportPublicReviews.model.js` | Normalizers for summary, review card, and dimension rows |

**⚠️ NOTE:** `vportPublicMenuPanel.model.js` mixes **presentation constants** (inline style objects) with domain model functions. Style objects belong in the view layer or a dedicated styles file, not the model.

---

### Controller Layer — `features/public/vportMenu/controller/`

| File | Calls | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `getVportPublicDetails.controller.js` | `readVportPublicDetailsRpcDAL` → `mapVportPublicDetailsRpcResult` | Details use-case boundary |
| `getVportPublicMenu.controller.js` | `readVportPublicMenuRpcDAL` → `mapVportPublicMenuRpcResult` | Menu use-case boundary |
| `getVportPublicReviews.controller.js` | `Promise.all([summaryDAL, reviewsDAL, dimensionsDAL])` → normalizers | Initial load + pagination controller |
| `resolveMenuSlug.controller.js` | `resolveMenuSlugDAL` | Slug → actorId (menu-only path) |
| `resolveVportSlug.controller.js` | `resolveVportSlugDAL` | Slug → actorId (any vport path) |

**Total controllers:** 5  
**⚠️ IMPORT VIOLATION:** `resolveMenuSlug.controller.js` and `resolveVportSlug.controller.js` use **relative imports** (`../dal/...`) instead of `@/` aliases. All cross-folder imports must use `@/`.

---

### Hook Layer — `features/public/vportMenu/hooks/`

| File | Calls | State |
|---|---|---|
| `useVportPublicDetails.js` | `getVportPublicDetailsController` | `result`, `loading`, `error` |
| `useVportPublicMenu.js` | `getVportPublicMenuController` | `result`, `loading`, `error` |
| `useVportPublicReviews.js` | `getVportPublicReviewsController`, `getVportPublicReviewsPageController` | `summary`, `reviews`, `dimensions`, `hasMore`, `loading`, `loadingMore`, `error` |
| `useResolveMenuSlug.js` | `resolveMenuSlugController` | `actorId`, `notFound` |
| `useResolveVportSlug.js` | `resolveVportSlugController` | `actorId`, `notFound` |
| `useDesktopBreakpoint.js` | `window.matchMedia` | `isDesktop` |

**⚠️ IMPORT VIOLATION:** `useResolveMenuSlug.js` and `useResolveVportSlug.js` use **relative imports** (`../controller/...`) instead of `@/` aliases.

---

### Component Layer — `features/public/vportMenu/components/`

| File | Props | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `VportPublicMenuPanel.jsx` | `categories`, `query`, `loading`, `error`, `rpcErrorCode` | Renders category/item grid with filter |
| `VportPublicReviewsPanel.jsx` | `actorId` | Calls `useVportPublicReviews` internally + `useAuth` |
| `VportPublicReviewCard.jsx` | `review` | Pure presentational card |
| `VportPublicReviewSummary.jsx` | `summary` | Rating badge + star display |
| `VportPublicReviewDimensions.jsx` | `dimensions` | Bar chart breakdown |
| `VportPublicReviewEmptyState.jsx` | `onWriteReview` | Empty state with CTA |

**⚠️ BOUNDARY VIOLATION:** `VportPublicReviewsPanel` calls `useVportPublicReviews` directly as a hook inside a component. Components must not call hooks with data-fetching effects — this belongs in the View layer. This creates a **double-load** when `VportPublicMenuView` also calls `useVportPublicReviews({ actorId })` independently.

## DUPLICATE IMPLEMENTATION FINDINGS

### DUPLICATE 1 — Parallel Public Menu View

**Behavior:** Public online menu rendering for a VPORT actor  
**Location A (canonical):** `features/public/vportMenu/view/VportPublicMenuView.jsx`  
**Location B (duplicate):** `features/profiles/kinds/vport/screens/menu/VportActorMenuPublicView.jsx`  

**Active paths:**
- `/profile/:slug/menu` → `VportPublicMenuBySlugScreen` → `VportPublicMenuView` (canonical)
- `/actor/:actorId/menu` → `VportActorMenuPublicScreen` → `VportActorMenuPublicView` (duplicate)

**Divergence:**
| Concern | VportPublicMenuView (canonical) | VportActorMenuPublicView (duplicate) |
|---|---|---|
| Hook used | `useVportPublicDetails` (this module) | `useVportPublicDetails` (profiles feature — different hook!) |
| Review tab | YES — inline in view | NO — menu only |
| Back navigation | UUID guard + canonical slug | Raw actorId in `/profile/${actorId}` ⚠️ |
| TTL cache | NO | NO |
| Import source | `@/features/public/vportMenu/...` | `@/features/profiles/kinds/vport/...` |

**Risk:** CRITICAL — two divergent public pages for the same route pattern; the duplicate's back navigation writes `/profile/${actorId}` which exposes a raw UUID in the URL (violates `feedback_no_raw_ids_in_urls.md`).

**Canonical owner:** `features/public/vportMenu/`  
**Recommended consolidation:** `VportActorMenuPublicView` should be deprecated and its route `/actor/:actorId/menu` should redirect directly to `/profile/:slug/menu` via the slug redirect screen already in this module.

---

### DUPLICATE 2 — Parallel `useVportPublicDetails` Hook

**Behavior:** Fetch public VPORT details for the menu header  
**Location A (canonical):** `features/public/vportMenu/hooks/useVportPublicDetails.js`  
- Calls `getVportPublicDetailsController` from THIS module
- Returns `{ result, details, loading, error, refresh, rpcErrorCode }`

**Location B (duplicate):** `features/profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/useVportPublicDetails.js`  
- Calls `getVportPublicDetailsController` from PROFILES feature (different controller!)
- Has `console.log` debug output in DEV mode (violates debug logging rules)
- Returns `{ loading, details, error }` (different shape)

**Risk:** HIGH — two independent hooks, two independent controller+DAL chains for the same domain concept. Data shapes diverge silently. The duplicate violates the boundary that public data access lives in `features/public/`.

**Canonical owner:** `features/public/vportMenu/hooks/useVportPublicDetails.js`

---

### DUPLICATE 3 — Double Read of `vport.public_menu_read_model_v`

**Behavior:** Load public menu page initial state  
**Pattern:** When `VportPublicMenuView` mounts, it calls both:
1. `useVportPublicDetails({ actorId })` → `readVportPublicDetailsRpcDAL` → `public_menu_read_model_v`
2. `useVportPublicMenu({ actorId })` → `readVportPublicMenuRpcDAL` → `public_menu_read_model_v`

Both reads hit the same view with the same `eq("actor_id", actorId)` filter. These could be a single query.

Additionally:
3. `resolveMenuSlugDAL` during slug resolution → `public_menu_read_model_v` (cached after first call)

**Risk:** MEDIUM — 2 uncached parallel reads against the same materialized view on every page mount. For a public consumer-facing page (e.g. scan QR at restaurant), this is every visitor's first paint.

**Recommended consolidation:** Merge `readVportPublicDetailsRpcDAL` and `readVportPublicMenuRpcDAL` into a single DAL function that returns both the profile details and menu rows in one query, then split output in the model layer.

---

### DUPLICATE 4 — Double `useVportPublicReviews` Call

**Pattern:** When user is on the **Menu tab** of `VportPublicMenuView`, the view calls `useVportPublicReviews({ actorId })` to show the rating summary in the header. When user switches to the **Reviews tab**, `VportPublicReviewsPanel` is rendered — which also calls `useVportPublicReviews({ actorId })` internally.

This means `useVportPublicReviews` is called **twice for the same actorId** when the Reviews tab is active.

**Risk:** MEDIUM — 3 extra DB reads (summary, reviews page, dimensions) fired when the Reviews tab becomes active, even though they were already fetched by the view.

**Recommended fix:** Lift `useVportPublicReviews` to the view level, pass `{ summary, reviews, dimensions, hasMore, loadingMore, error, loadMore }` as props to `VportPublicReviewsPanel`, removing the hook call from the component.

---

## MODULE BOUNDARY WARNINGS

### MODULE BOUNDARY WARNING #1

**Location:** `features/public/vportMenu/controller/resolveMenuSlug.controller.js:1`  
**Module:** vport-public-menu  
**Current dependency:** `import { resolveMenuSlugDAL } from '../dal/resolveMenuSlug.dal'` (relative)  
**Expected boundary:** `import { resolveMenuSlugDAL } from '@/features/public/vportMenu/dal/resolveMenuSlug.dal'`  
**Risk:** LOW — relative import chains are banned by CLAUDE.md. Same issue in `resolveVportSlug.controller.js`.  
**Suggested correction:** Replace both with `@/` aliases.

---

### MODULE BOUNDARY WARNING #2

**Location:** `features/public/vportMenu/hooks/useResolveMenuSlug.js:2`  
**Module:** vport-public-menu  
**Current dependency:** `import { resolveMenuSlugController } from '../controller/resolveMenuSlug.controller'` (relative)  
**Expected boundary:** `@/features/public/vportMenu/controller/resolveMenuSlug.controller`  
**Risk:** LOW — same violation. Also affects `useResolveVportSlug.js`.  
**Suggested correction:** Replace both with `@/` aliases.

---

### MODULE BOUNDARY WARNING #3

**Location:** `features/profiles/kinds/vport/screens/menu/VportActorMenuPublicView.jsx`  
**Module:** profiles/kinds/vport (accessing public/vportMenu domain)  
**Current dependency:** Uses `useVportPublicDetails` from `features/profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/` — a PARALLEL hook bypassing the canonical one in `features/public/vportMenu/`  
**Expected boundary:** All callers should use `useVportPublicDetails` from `features/public/vportMenu/` or through `vportMenu.adapter.js`  
**Risk:** HIGH — duplicate hook with different data shape and debug logging violations  
**Suggested correction:** Delete `features/profiles/kinds/vport/hooks/useVportPublicDetails.js` and redirect callers to `@/features/public/vportMenu/adapters/vportMenu.adapter`

---

### MODULE BOUNDARY WARNING #4

**Location:** `features/public/vportMenu/components/VportPublicReviewsPanel.jsx:49`  
**Module:** vport-public-menu  
**Current dependency:** `useAuth()` imported from `@/app/providers/AuthProvider` inside a component  
**Expected boundary:** Auth awareness belongs in the View layer, not a presentational component  
**Risk:** MEDIUM — public-facing component has auth coupling; makes component harder to test and reuse  
**Suggested correction:** Accept `isAuthed` as a prop from the view layer; keep component pure.

---

### MODULE BOUNDARY WARNING #5

**Location:** `features/public/vportMenu/model/vportPublicMenuPanel.model.js`  
**Module:** vport-public-menu  
**Current dependency:** Exports inline style objects (`PANEL_STYLE`, `THUMB_WRAP_STYLE`) from a model file  
**Expected boundary:** Style constants belong in `*.styles.js` or the view/component layer; model files must contain only pure domain transforms  
**Risk:** LOW — architectural pattern leak; not a runtime risk  
**Suggested correction:** Move `PANEL_STYLE` and `THUMB_WRAP_STYLE` into `VportPublicMenuPanel.jsx` directly or a `vportPublicMenuPanel.styles.js` file.

## SPAGHETTI SCORE

**Module:** `features/public/vportMenu/`  
**Score:** WATCH  
**Reasons:**
- Layer structure is largely clean (DAL → Model → Controller → Hook → Component → View → Screen)
- Relative imports in 4 files break the import convention
- Style constants in model file are a mild layer bleed
- `useAuth` in a presentational component is auth coupling in the wrong layer
- `VportPublicReviewsPanel` calling a data-fetching hook (double-load pattern)
- **The external duplicate** (`VportActorMenuPublicView`) is the real spaghetti risk — it shadows this module's canonical path

**Release risk:** MEDIUM — the duplicate public view has a confirmed UUID URL bug in back navigation. The uncached double-read creates unnecessary DB pressure on every visitor scan.

---

## CODE HEALTH METRICS

| Module | Files | Layers | Cross-Feature Imports | Cycles | Dead Code Signals | Spaghetti Score |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| vport-public-menu | 41 | 7 (full stack) | 5 inbound (via adapter — OK) | 0 | 0 within module | WATCH |
| VportActorMenuPublicView (external duplicate) | 2 | View + Screen | 3 (bypasses adapter) | 0 | CANDIDATE | TANGLED |

---

## FINAL MODULE STATUS: MOSTLY COMPLETE

The canonical `features/public/vportMenu/` module is architecturally sound with all 7 layers present, a proper adapter surface, UUID guards on QR outputs, and well-scoped DB reads through views. The module is **release-ready for read-only public browsing**.

**Blocking gaps before full independence:**
1. Write-review CTA is dead — no submission route exists after login redirect
2. Duplicate `VportActorMenuPublicView` owns the `/actor/:actorId/menu` route with a UUID URL bug
3. Duplicate `useVportPublicDetails` hook in profiles feature diverges silently

---

## MODULE BUILD PRIORITY

| Priority | Work Needed | Reason | Recommended Command |
|---|---|---|---|
| P1 | Deprecate `VportActorMenuPublicView` + `profiles/../hooks/useVportPublicDetails.js` | UUID bug in back nav; dual hook divergence | Wolverine → SENTRY |
| P1 | Wire review write route after CTA login redirect | CTA is dead for authenticated users | Wolverine |
| P2 | Add TTL cache to `readVportPublicMenuRpcDAL` + `readVportPublicDetailsRpcDAL` | Every page mount = 2 uncached reads against same view | KRAVEN review then Wolverine |
| P2 | Merge menu + details into single DAL read | Halves round trips on page mount | Wolverine |
| P2 | Fix `@/` alias violations in 2 controllers + 2 hooks | CLAUDE.md rule: no relative `../` chains | SENTRY |
| P2 | Lift `useVportPublicReviews` out of component to view level | Double-hook on Reviews tab | SENTRY |
| P3 | Extract `PANEL_STYLE`/`THUMB_WRAP_STYLE` from model file | Model layer must not contain style objects | SENTRY |
| P3 | Extract `isAuthed` prop into `VportPublicReviewsPanel` (remove `useAuth`) | Component purity | SENTRY |
| P3 | Split `VportPublicMenuView.jsx` (301 lines) | Over 300-line limit | SENTRY |
| P3 | Write Logan documentation for this module | LOGAN drift prevention | LOGAN |
